{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/153918146?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/55728", "id": 153918146, "login": "55728", "node_id": "U_kgDOCSyawg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/55728", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44476", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "### Impact

The `DynamicClientRegistrationController#register` action hard-codes `confidential: false` when creating applications (dynamic_client_registration_controller.rb:18-25), yet the response includes a client_secret and advertises `token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported: ["client_secret_basic", "client_secret_post"]`.

Because Doorkeeper's `Application.by_uid_and_secret` treats a blank/missing secret as valid for non-confidential (public) clients, an
attacker who knows only the client_id (which is public information) can authenticate as the dynamically-registered client at the token endpoint.

**Note** that Dynamic Client Registration is opt-in feature which is disabled by default so only projects that explicitly enabled it are affected.

**Steps to Reproduce**

1. Enable dynamic client registration in the initializer
2. POST /oauth/registration with client_name, redirect_uris, and scope
3. Observe: response returns client_secret, but the created
Doorkeeper::Application has confidential: false
4. Call `Doorkeeper::Application.by_uid_and_secret(client_id, nil)` — it
returns the application (credentials bypass)
5. POST /oauth/token with grant_type=client_credentials and only
client_id (no client_secret) — the token endpoint issues an access token
without any secret verification


### Patches
Patched in 1.10.0

### Workarounds
Upgrade existing applications created with a Dynamic Client registration to have `confidential: true`", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00058, "percentile": 0.18564}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T14:37:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44476"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-04T14:37:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper-openid_connect/security/advisories/GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h", "https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper-openid_connect/releases/tag/v1.10.0", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/doorkeeper-openid_connect/CVE-2026-44476.yml", "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-44476", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper-openid_connect/security-advisories/GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper-openid_connect", "summary": "Doorkeeper Openid Connect: Dynamic Client Registration feature creates public clients with client_secret", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T11:57:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m6vc-f87m-cc2h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.10.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "doorkeeper-openid_connect"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 1.9.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Doorkeeper Openid Connect: Dynamic Client Registration feature creates public clients with client_secret
